summary: Complete testing of press-ready trifold brochure technical overhaul - all specifications verified and working correctly
passed_tests: Panel 1 displays correct Russian title: 'Пока мир восхищается вашим образом — мы следим за тем, что его создаёт'
Page 1 grid has asymmetric columns (100mm 100mm 103mm) as specified
Page 2 grid has asymmetric columns (103mm 100mm 100mm) as specified
All text colors are pure black (#000000) as required
Safe zone paddings correctly applied (5mm/8mm specifications)
Crop marks present with correct .crop-marks, .crop-h, .crop-v classes
All 5 images load successfully (desk.jpg, qrcode-price.png, doctors.jpg, needles.jpg, spine.jpg)
Panel 4 has spine image at bottom as required
Panel 3 has needles image at top as required
CMYK specification comment block present in CSS
Fold marks positioned correctly for both pages
Print-ready layout structure intact with proper bleeds and crop marks
